response.justification: The candidate has extensive experience as a full-stack and web software developer but completely lacks the specialized hardware and systems architecture background required for this role. There is no evidence of experience with SoC/IP modeling, deep learning workload optimization, SIMD/MIMD architectures, or hardware-software co-design, which are the fundamental requirements for a Principal Performance Architect.
strengths: Over 15 years of general software engineering experience across various domains.
Experience with low-latency applications and high-performance databases using DLang and C++.
Strong background in testing methodologies, CI/CD pipelines, and open-source project management.
concerns: Complete lack of required experience in SoC and IP modeling or hardware-software co-design.
No demonstrated background in AI/deep-learning accelerator hardware, GPU architecture, or SIMD/MIMD.
Career focus has been predominantly on full-stack web development, UI, and GIS, rather than hardware performance optimization.
